---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="65%"}

# Amandeep Singh

## Experimental Quantum Physicist

**Postdoctoral Fellow**

Institute of Applied Physics  
The Hebrew University of Jerusalem

---

### Research Mission

Developing **solid-state defects for quantum sensing and quantum technologies**, combining experimental physics, quantum control, scientific instrumentation, and open-source software to build next-generation quantum sensing platforms.

<br>

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="pages/research.html">Research</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="pages/publications.html">Publications</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="pages/software.html">Software</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="pages/cv.html">CV</a>

::::

:::: {.column width="35%"}

![](assets/images/profile/profile.jpg){fig-alt="Amandeep Singh" width="100%"}

::::

:::

---

# Research Highlights

### Quantum Sensing

Diamond NV centers, precision magnetometry and quantum sensing.

---

### Quantum Magnetic Imaging

Widefield ODMR, microwave-free imaging, event-camera imaging and lock-in imaging.

---

### Quantum Control

Pulse engineering, Quantum Machines OPX, synchronized instrumentation.

---

### Scientific Software

Python-based experimental control, automation and data analysis.

---

### Nanofabrication

Diamond device fabrication and material characterization.
